title: dryopteris hirta
intro: Dryopteris hirta, also known as the hairy male fern, is a species of fern native to North America. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, and is often used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris hirta include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for different methods of consumption and application.
